form.formComment: Placed last start 2nd (Fr1) over 1660m after showing early speed at this track, beaten a head by Copy Writer (2:03.00) in 3yo+ NR up to 37 on March 30 at $23. Before that 3rd (Fr1) over 1850m after showing early pace at Marburg, beaten 10 m by Pink River Diamond (2:17.70) in 3yo+ NR up to 37 on March 23 at $3.80. Place hope again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted in and sulky wheel went inside a marker peg on the final corner.
Locked wheels momentarily with Jimmy Joyce around the 1700m.

form.formComment: Solid run when beaten by 2.25 m finishing fourth behind Lets Go Bailey at this track over 1660m in a 3yo+ NR up to 40 on March 13 at $13. Then a handy effort when beaten by 9 m finishing second behind Gidup Captain at this track over 1660m in a 3yo+ NR up to 41 on March 20 at $5.50. Nice effort last time. In the mix from the low draw.

form.formComment: Well beaten last start by Keayang Tara, a rival who she faces again; when 25 metres eighth at Marburg over 1850m in a 3yo+ NR up to 37 race on April 5. This looks a far sterner test.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Well beaten last start by Keayang Tara, a rival who she faces again; when 25 metres eighth at Marburg over 1850m in a 3yo+ NR up to 37 race on April 5. This looks a far sterner test.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Contacted a marker peg on the turn out of the front straight after the start.

form.formComment: Last start 4th (Sr1) over 1850m at Marburg, beaten 5.5 m by Keayang Tara (2:18.30) in 3yo+ NR up to 37 on April 5 at $8. Before that, was well back in the run when 8th (Fr5) over 1660m after being wide early at this track beaten 9 m by Copy Writer (2:03.00) in 3yo+ NR up to 37 on March 30 at $31. This looks a suitable assignment.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Locked wheels momentarily with Mollidor around the 1700m.

form.formComment: Fair run when beaten by 5.5 m finishing second after a quick start, behind Lulu Lucifer at Marburg over 1850m in a 3yo+ NR 38 to 42 on March 23 at $2.15. Then a handy effort when beaten by 1.2 m finishing third behind Copy Writer at this track over 1660m in a 3yo+ NR up to 37 on March 30 at $2.20. Sure to go well again.

form.formComment: Last start won by a head (Sr4) at Marburg (2:18.30) beating Sporty Azz in 3yo+ NR up to 37 on April 5 at $12. In form and should feature in the finish again.

formComments.comment: Last start won by a head (Sr4) at Marburg (2:18.30) beating Sporty Azz in 3yo+ NR up to 37 on April 5 at $12. In form and should feature in the finish again.

form.formComment: Last start saluted by 1.0 m (Sr1) at Redcliffe (2:12.40) beating Captain Oh Captain in 3yo+ NR up to 40 on April 2 at $8. In fine form and looks a serious player again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start saluted by 1.0 m (Sr1) at Redcliffe (2:12.40) beating Captain Oh Captain in 3yo+ NR up to 40 on April 2 at $8. In fine form and looks a serious player again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inclined to hang un under pressure over the concluding stages of the event.
Hung in and contacted a marker post leaving the 800m.

form.formComment: Two back was beaten by 7 m finishing second behind Pink River Diamond at Marburg over 1850m in a 3yo+ NR up to 37 on March 23 at $8. Then a handy effort when a close second behind Keayang Tara at Marburg over 1850m in a 3yo+ NR up to 37 on April 5 at $6. Leading contender.

formComments.comment: Two back was beaten by 7 m finishing second behind Pink River Diamond at Marburg over 1850m in a 3yo+ NR up to 37 on March 23 at $8. Then a handy effort when a close second behind Keayang Tara at Marburg over 1850m in a 3yo+ NR up to 37 on April 5 at $6. Leading contender.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Restrained at the start to a rearward trailing position.

form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; 8th (Fr2) over 1660m at this track, beaten 30 m by Jeffcoate (1:58.70) in 3yo+ NR 40 to 45 on March 27 at $21. Showed ability the outing before when he won by 9 m after showing early speed, (Fr2) at this track (2:00.40) beating Three Chord Riff in 3yo+ NR up to 41 on March 20 at $7.50. Rates well on best form and worth including.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inclined to hang out when leading leaving the 600m point.
Surrendered the lead over the early stages of the event.

form.formComment: Last start won by 3 m when driven back in the field, (Fr4) held up early, at Redcliffe (2:13.90) beating My Ultimate Louie in 3yo+ NR up to 39 on March 26 at $34. Sure to be thereabouts.
